::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(sales_summary, aes(x = month, y = revenue)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(
    title = "Monthly Revenue Trend",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Revenue"
  )
```
